summary: Tested Scout page DuckDuckGo web search integration. All 22 backend tests pass (including 3 new DuckDuckGo search endpoint tests). Frontend Scout page fully functional: Event Concierge tab with 3 predefined sources, Opportunity Hunter tab with 4 predefined sources, DuckDuckGo web search discovers and adds sources with 'discovered' label, manual URL addition works, source removal works (X button on hover for non-default sources), tab switching works, source count updates in scan buttons, Back to Home navigation works. Login flow works with test credentials.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scout page DuckDuckGo integration verified. POST /api/scout/search-urls endpoint returns discovered URLs from DuckDuckGo HTML parsing. Event Concierge tab: 3 predefined sources (Solana Events, Crypto Nomads, ETH Global), web search input, manual URL input, Start Event Scan button with source count. Opportunity Hunter tab: 4 predefined sources (Crypto Jobs, Web3 Career, Gitcoin Grants, Devfolio Hackathons), goal textarea, web search input, manual URL input, Start Opportunity Hunt button with source count. DuckDuckGo search adds sources marked with 'discovered' label. Non-default sources can be removed via X button on hover. Tab switching works. TinyFish scraping API is real integration but not tested in this run. Brave Search API code is commented out for future use.
features_tested: POST /api/scout/search-urls returns discovered URLs from DuckDuckGo
Scout page (/scout) loads without errors after login
Event Concierge tab shows predefined sources (Solana Events, Crypto Nomads, ETH Global)
Event Concierge tab has web search input ('Discover sources from the web')
Event Concierge tab has manual URL input ('Add custom URL...')
Searching via DuckDuckGo adds discovered sources to the list (marked with 'discovered' label)
Opportunity Hunter tab shows predefined sources (Crypto Jobs, Web3 Career, Gitcoin Grants, Devfolio Hackathons)
Opportunity Hunter tab has goal input textarea
Opportunity Hunter tab has web search and manual URL inputs
Tab switching works between Event Concierge and Opportunity Hunter
Non-default sources can be removed (X button appears on hover)
Start Event Scan button shows source count
Start Opportunity Hunt button shows source count
Back to Home button navigation works
Login flow works with test credentials
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. DuckDuckGo web search integration working correctly. All Scout page features functional.
